name: Allegory: A Tapestry of Guru Nanak's Travels
original_name: Allegory: A Tapestry of Guru Nanak's Travels
overview: A journey of Oneness which is inspired by historical texts and guided by the philosophy of Guru Nanak, the gentle valiant.
